# GitHub Badges Documentation

This document explains the badges displayed in the project README.md and how they are configured.

## Badge Overview

### Build & Test Status

| Badge | Description | Configuration |
|-------|-------------|---------------|
| [![Tests](https://github.com/SHAdd0WTAka/Zen-Ai-Pentest/workflows/Tests%20&%20Coverage/badge.svg)](https://github.com/SHAdd0WTAka/Zen-Ai-Pentest/actions) | GitHub Actions test workflow status | `.github/workflows/tests.yml` |
| [![codecov](https://codecov.io/gh/SHAdd0WTAka/Zen-Ai-Pentest/branch/main/graph/badge.svg)](https://codecov.io/gh/SHAdd0WTAka/Zen-Ai-Pentest) | Code coverage percentage via Codecov | `codecov.yml` + GitHub Secret `CODECOV_TOKEN` |
| [![Security Scan](https://github.com/SHAdd0WTAka/Zen-Ai-Pentest/workflows/Security%20Scan/badge.svg)](https://github.com/SHAdd0WTAka/Zen-Ai-Pentest/actions) | Security scanning workflow status | `.github/workflows/security.yml` |

### Project Info

| Badge | Description | Source |
|-------|-------------|--------|
| [![Python 3.11+](https://img.shields.io/badge/python-3.11+-blue.svg)](https://www.python.org/downloads/) | Minimum Python version requirement | Static badge from shields.io |
| [![License: MIT](https://img.shields.io/badge/License-MIT-yellow.svg)](LICENSE) | Project license | Static badge from shields.io |

## How to Update Badges

### 1. Test Status Badge

The test badge is automatically updated by GitHub Actions.

To modify:
1. Edit `.github/workflows/tests.yml`
2. The badge URL reflects the workflow name: `Tests%20&%20Coverage` = "Tests & Coverage"

**URL Format:**
```
https://github.com/{OWNER}/{REPO}/workflows/{WORKFLOW_NAME}/badge.svg
```

### 2. Codecov Badge

The coverage badge is automatically generated by Codecov.

**Setup:**
1. Sign in to [codecov.io](https://codecov.io) with your GitHub account
2. Add the repository
3. Copy the badge URL from Codecov settings
4. Add `CODECOV_TOKEN` to GitHub Secrets (Settings > Secrets and variables > Actions)

**URL Format:**
```
https://codecov.io/gh/{OWNER}/{REPO}/branch/{BRANCH}/graph/badge.svg
```

### 3. Security Scan Badge

The security badge is automatically updated by GitHub Actions.

To modify:
1. Edit `.github/workflows/security.yml`
2. The badge reflects the workflow name: `Security%20Scan` = "Security Scan"

### 4. Static Badges

Python version and License badges are static and use [shields.io](https://shields.io):

**Python Badge:**
```markdown
[![Python 3.11+](https://img.shields.io/badge/python-3.11+-blue.svg)](https://www.python.org/downloads/)
```

**License Badge:**
```markdown
[![License: MIT](https://img.shields.io/badge/License-MIT-yellow.svg)](LICENSE)
```

## Badge Markup (Copy-Paste)

```markdown
[![Tests](https://github.com/SHAdd0WTAka/Zen-Ai-Pentest/workflows/Tests%20&%20Coverage/badge.svg)](https://github.com/SHAdd0WTAka/Zen-Ai-Pentest/actions)
[![codecov](https://codecov.io/gh/SHAdd0WTAka/Zen-Ai-Pentest/branch/main/graph/badge.svg)](https://codecov.io/gh/SHAdd0WTAka/Zen-Ai-Pentest)
[![Python 3.11+](https://img.shields.io/badge/python-3.11+-blue.svg)](https://www.python.org/downloads/)
[![License: MIT](https://img.shields.io/badge/License-MIT-yellow.svg)](LICENSE)
[![Security Scan](https://github.com/SHAdd0WTAka/Zen-Ai-Pentest/workflows/Security%20Scan/badge.svg)](https://github.com/SHAdd0WTAka/Zen-Ai-Pentest/actions)
```

## Troubleshooting

### Badge Not Updating

1. **GitHub Actions Badge:**
   - Check that the workflow file exists at `.github/workflows/{name}.yml`
   - Ensure the workflow name matches the URL exactly (spaces = `%20`)
   - Verify the workflow has run at least once

2. **Codecov Badge:**
   - Ensure `CODECOV_TOKEN` is set in GitHub Secrets
   - Check that coverage is being uploaded in the workflow
   - Verify the branch name in the URL matches your default branch

### Badge Shows "No Status"

- The workflow may not have run yet
- Check the Actions tab for workflow failures
- Ensure the repository is public (private repos need authentication tokens)
